name: senvirox
description: SENVIROX Enterprise Digital Signage Platform — Project Foundation

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @senvirox/shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start -w backend" "npm run start -w frontend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @senvirox/shared && npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
